title: @ericosiu: Karpathy's autoresearch isn't just for AI research. You can use it for business....
rawContent:
Tweet by @ericosiu (ericosiu)
Author bio: Founder ad agency @singlegrain, Investor. Member: @YPO Beverly Hills Podcaster: Marketing School, Leveling Up
Text: Karpathy's autoresearch isn't just for AI research. You can use it for business. 

Imagine running 700x more experiments:

- Landing pages
- Creatives
- AEO/SEO
- Pricing
- E-mails
- Cold outreach
- Warm outreach
- AP/AR
- Procurement
